'''Rhire''' was the capital city of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Rhinnal/Legends|Rhinnal]]. It contained the [[Rhire Concourse of Humanity and History]] and the [[Circulation Network|Circ]].

==History==
The city was located in the southern fringe of the inhabited equatorial band and situated in the north of the mighty [[Frieste River]]. Blizzards blowing in from the south inspired Rhire [[Architect/Legends|architects]] to build all structures low to the ground with a preponderance of strudy cylindrical buildings capped with snow-shedding cupolas. Rhire sprawled far and wide to accommodate its many citizens. Street traffic was relatively light because most denizens traveled via an underground shuttle system known as the [[Circulation Network]].<ref name="Rhire" />

{{City-stub}}
